div.p: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

tr.td:
Determine if the client is due for Cholera.: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole-cell (WC) vaccines schedule
If:
Applicability:
Client is due for cholera vaccination
(Client is due for cholera vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE2', display: 'Cholera vaccines' } }, display: 'Cholera vaccines' })

Determine if the client is due for Cholera.: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole-cell (WC) vaccines schedule
If:
Applicability:
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose
(Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE2', display: 'Cholera vaccines' } }, display: 'Cholera vaccines' })

Determine if the client is due for Cholera.: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole-cell (WC) vaccines schedule
If:
Applicability:
Client is due for cholera booster dose
(Client is due for cholera booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE2', display: 'Cholera vaccines' } }, display: 'Cholera vaccines' })

Check for Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC vaccines.: Show Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC vaccines.
If:
Applicability:
Has Guidance
(Has Guidance)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

valueString.value: Current Patient Age In Years
/** * @dataElement Patient age in years */ define "Current Patient Age In Years": AgeInYearsAt(Today)
Client's age is less than 1 year
Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 1
Client's age is more than or equal to 1 year
Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": [Immunization] I where I.status = 'completed' and I.isSubpotent is not true
Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
Cholera Doses Administered to Patient

/* @internal: Cholera containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Cholera Doses Administered to Patient": Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Cholera vaccines"
Cholera Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Cholera Primary Series Doses Administered
One cholera primary series dose was administered
Date of Latest Cholera Dose
The latest cholera dose was administered less than 14 days ago
Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 2
Client is not due for cholera vaccination
Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance

/* @output: Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance @guidance = Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as client's age is under 1 year. Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first cholera dose. @guidance = Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered less than 14 days ago. Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose. */ define "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance": case when "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 1" then 'Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as client\'s age is under 1 year. Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first cholera dose.' when "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Case 2" then 'Should not vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered less than 14 days ago. Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose.' else '' end
No cholera primary series dose was administered
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 1
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 2
Two cholera primary series doses were administered
Cholera Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Cholera Booster Series Doses Administered
At least one booster series dose was administered
The latest cholera dose was administered less than 3 years ago
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 3 years ago
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 3
Client is due for cholera vaccination
Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance

/* @output: Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance @guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as no doses have been given. @guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago. Check for contraindications. @guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the booster series for cholera was completed more than 3 years ago. Check for contraindications. */ define "Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance": case when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 1" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as no doses have been given.' when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 2" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago. Check for contraindications.' when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 3" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the booster series for cholera was completed more than 3 years ago. Check for contraindications.' else '' end
No cholera booster series dose was administered
Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose
Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance
Dose number of the latest dose is one
Client is not due for cholera booster dose
Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 14 days ago and less than 3 years ago
Client is due for cholera booster dose
Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance
Dose number of the latest dose is two
Booster series is complete
Booster series is complete Guidance

/* @dynamicValue: Guidance */ define "Guidance": case when "Client is not due for cholera vaccination" then "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance" when "Client is due for cholera vaccination" then "Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance" when "Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose" then "Primary series is complete. Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance" when "Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose" then "Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance" when "Client is not due for cholera booster dose" then "Client is not due for cholera booster dose Guidance" when "Client is due for cholera booster dose" then "Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance" when "Booster series is complete" then "Booster series is complete Guidance" else '' end
Has Guidance
define "Has Guidance": "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series */ define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>): Last( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series */ define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )

/** * @description: Gets a given immunization from a list that matches the dose number */ define fluent function getDose(immunization Immunization, doseNumber String): immunization I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.doseNumber = doseNumber )

name.value: Client is due for cholera booster dose
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose
Client is due for cholera vaccination

citation.value: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

valueMarkdown.value: For WC vaccines (Shanchol, Euvchol and mORCVAX), 2 doses should be given 14 days apart to individuals aged ≥ 1 year.

title.value: Determine if the client is due for Cholera.

description.value: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole-cell (WC) vaccines schedule
Client is due for cholera vaccination

expression.value: Client is due for cholera vaccination
Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE2', display: 'Cholera vaccines' } }, display: 'Cholera vaccines' }

valueMarkdown.value: Revaccination is recommended where there is continued risk of Vibrio cholerae infection. For WC vaccines, revaccination is recommended after 3 years.

title.value: Determine if the client is due for Cholera.

description.value: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole-cell (WC) vaccines schedule
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose

Client is due for cholera booster dose

expression.value: Client is due for cholera booster dose

title.value: Check for Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC vaccines.

description.value: Show Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC vaccines.
